title: Yiting Hu (Dora) - Foster Global
content:
Yiting Hu (Dora) is a senior attorney at Foster LLP in our Houston office.  She works primarily on employment-based business and investment immigration matters, including EB-5 regional center and investor work.
Dora received her LL.B in International Economic Law from the University of Business and International Economics in Beijing, China, and an LL.M. in Comparative Law from the University of Florida Levin College of Law in 2004. Dora graduated with J.D. from the University of Houston Law School.
Dora is licensed in the State of New York and is a member of the State Bar of New York.
Why Did You Decide To Become An Immigration Attorney?
Being an immigrant myself and having received tremendous help from my immigration lawyer, I want to be one like my lawyer, helping and advocating for my clients. – Dora Hu
- “Practical Advice to Avoid Consular Processing Pitfalls for EB-5 Investors” , Volume 7/Issue 1, 2019, EB-5 Investors Magazine
- EB5 Investors Magazine (June, 2015), “ Impact of EB-5 Retrogression on Project Choice ”
